clips.title: Baking Day
clips.prompt: Stop-motion claymation style, molded clay figures, visible fingerprint texture, handmade plasticine, tactile, soft studio light. Present day. A cozy clay kitchen, rounded clay cabinets, a little clay oven, clay utensils. Morning, warm. A person made of clay kneads dough on the counter, smiling, hands pressed in the dough. A clay rolling pin, clay bowls, a clay cat. Soft warm studio light, tactile clay surfaces. Slow dolly in. Charming claymation aesthetic, 24fps.
